name: Mashed Sweet Potatoes with Marshmallows
recipeInstructions:
1. Mash the sweet potatoes using a sieve, electric beater, potato masher, or food mill.
2. Gradually add milk while mixing to avoid splashing.
3. Incorporate the remaining ingredients into the mashed sweet potatoes.
4. Transfer the mixture to a buttered casserole dish.
5. Bake in a slow oven at 250°F for 20-30 minutes, or heat through using a microwave.
6. Cover the top with marshmallows and return to the oven until they are slightly melted and lightly browned.
Rating: Difficulty - easy with an electric mixer; Time - 15 minutes preparation, 30 minutes baking. Precision - approximate measurements are acceptable.
